aids.title: PPSEA - Servlet Advantages over CGI
aids.content: **P**erformance (threads not processes), **P**latform independent (Java), **S**ession management (built-in), **E**xtensible (Java API), **A**rchitecture (MVC compatible).
aids.forRemembering: Key advantages of Servlets over CGI

aids.title: Container Does LIRS
aids.content: **L**oads servlet classes, **I**nitializes servlet instances, **R**outes requests to servlets, **S**huts down servlets gracefully. LIRS - the servlet container's main jobs.

aids.title: CGI vs Servlet Analogy
aids.content: CGI is like hiring a new employee for each customer (expensive). Servlets are like having one employee handle multiple customers via multitasking (efficient).
aids.forRemembering: Why servlets are better than CGI

aids.title: GET vs POST Quick Rule
aids.content: GET for Getting data (visible in URL, bookmarkable). POST for Posting/sending data (hidden in body, for forms). Remember: 'GET is in the address bar, POST is behind the scenes.'
aids.forRemembering: When to use GET vs POST
